unexpected_finds.label: Picture v1.18 itself co-resides two M6 statuses (✅ DONE row 005 H4-leg vs 🟡 PARTIAL row 009/015 canonical-form leg) inside the same prompt-table without a leg-disambiguation column
unexpected_finds.context: STEP 2 substrate read; §S6e + §S6f. The dual-status co-residence is the substrate-internal precedent for the verdict's two-named-legs structure, but it had not been previously surfaced as an explicit picture-schema observation. The verdict's spec-amendment recommendation #3 directs picture v1.19 to tabulate M6.H4 and M6.CC as adjacent rows, formalising what picture v1.18 already does implicitly.
unexpected_finds.novelty: low (implicit in picture v1.18; surfaced explicitly here for the first time at synthesizer-track level)
